creator: ecsd@transbay.net
text: I understand perfectly what you are saying. You are simply mistaken. I know exactly what sort traffic I expect. The source is high volume, and while of a stochastic nature as regards source address, very predictable (e.g. People's Republic of China generates so many hits per hour.) The rule sits there waiting for any such traffic. The rules are simply not firing. I am reporting a bug. It is a BUG, not an error in user observation or understanding. I am waiting to hear if anyone has experienced anything similar or if anyone can suggest something to try within the kernel to change the behavior (ie. make it stop malfunctioning.)
